Coordinate.description: Geographic point. lon/lat order matches GeoJSON [lon, lat].
Coordinate.title: Coordinate

VesselType.description: Vessel / object-in-water type. Controls Leeway coefficient in L1.
VesselType.title: VesselType

description:
All information a field operator provides when a vessel goes missing.
Three mandatory fields (last coordinate, time, vessel type) — everything
else is optional to lower friction during emergencies.

request_id.description: UUID assigned at intake; echoed in all downstream results
request_id.title: Request Id

vessel_id.description: V-Pass / AIS vessel ID if known
vessel_id.title: Vessel Id

last_seen_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last confirmed signal
last_seen_at.title: Last Seen At

tonnage_tons.description: Gross tonnage — used to select Leeway sub-range
tonnage_tons.title: Tonnage Tons

simulation_hours.description: How many hours ahead to simulate drift
simulation_hours.title: Simulation Hours

notes.description: Free-text field notes from the operator
notes.title: Notes

title: PredictionRequest
